final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input d,
    output reg q);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 0;
    end else if (enable) begin
        q <= d;
    end
end
endmodule
